description: This Java class defines the entity 'CorrectiveAction' used in a defect management system. It models corrective actions with fields such as defect reference, action description, status, due date, assignee, notes, and timestamps. It includes JPA annotations for ORM mapping and methods for property access and mutation.

classes.name: CorrectiveAction
classes.description: JPA Entity class representing a corrective action linked to defects, with fields for status, due date, assignee, notes, and timestamps. Implements basic getter and setter methods, and maintains timestamps with pre-update callback.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the unique identifier of the corrective action.

methods.name: setDefect
methods.description: Associates a Defect entity with this corrective action.

methods.name: getAction
methods.description: Returns the description of the corrective action.

methods.name: setAction
methods.description: Sets the description of the corrective action.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the current status of the corrective action.

methods.name: setStatus
methods.description: Updates the status of the corrective action.

methods.name: getDueDate
methods.description: Returns the due date for the corrective action.

methods.name: setDueDate
methods.description: Sets the due date for the corrective action.

methods.name: getAssignee
methods.description: Returns the User assigned to the corrective action.

methods.name: setAssignee
methods.description: Assigns a User to this corrective action.

methods.name: getNotes
methods.description: Returns notes related to the corrective action.

methods.name: setNotes
methods.description: Adds notes to the corrective action.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the corrective action was created.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp of the last update to the corrective action.
